query: Review this Express service for a Singapore agency and report ICT&SS AS/CK findings: validation, SQL injection, passwords, sessions, secrets, headers, uploads, errors, cryptography, and key handling.

Build registration, login, password reset, and session handling for an agency e-service using parameterised Postgres queries, Argon2, schema validation, rate limiting, safe errors, and SSP-defined parameters.
Our VAPT found IDOR, reflected XSS, wildcard CSP, weak HSTS, stack traces, and a file processed before malware scanning. Remediate the application with AS control traceability.
Design cryptographic key establishment, rotation, lifecycle management, and HSM-backed storage for application signing and encryption keys under CK-1 through CK-4.

Review a Java Spring API for IM8-successor application controls. Focus on trust-boundary validation, parameterised persistence, object-level authorisation, secret injection, headers, sessions, uploads, and error hygiene.

The source hardcodes a DB password and session secret, hashes passwords with SHA-1, and generates reset tokens with Math.random. Produce severity-rated fixes without inventing SSP password or session values.
Implement a secure upload endpoint for a government service: validate type and size, quarantine, malware-scan before parsing, avoid shell interpolation, store safely, and return generic errors.

Audit our CSP, HSTS, output encoding, authentication throttling, session expiry, forced password-change path, and maintained cryptographic libraries against AS-3, AS-4, AS-9, AS-10, AS-11, AS-14, and AS-15.

We are adding envelope encryption to an agency service. Review algorithm/library selection, KMS key policies, key rotation, separation of key material from data, and emergency revocation with CK control IDs.
Do a pull-request security review for a Singapore Government API and distinguish application-code findings from IAM, data protection, pipeline, and container controls.
Set up branch protection, signed commits, CodeQL, Dependabot, SBOMs, cosign, and GitHub OIDC for AWS deployments.
Audit IAM users, MFA, access reviews, inactive accounts, government SSO, SCIM provisioning, and endpoint posture.
Configure container digest pinning, non-root execution, runtime secrets, read-only filesystems, private EKS API access, NetworkPolicy, and Falco.
Review VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail, GCSOC forwarding, retention, structured formats, UEBA, and security alerting.
Write a simple login form for my personal demo using an in-memory user list. It will never be deployed and has no Singapore Government context.
Set up Singpass FAPI 2.0 PAR, PKCE, DPoP, Myinfo scopes, identity claims, and application onboarding.
Design encrypted backups, immutable retention, restoration tests, RTO/RPO, and disaster recovery exercises.
Create a VAPT scope, RFC 9116 disclosure channel, vulnerability register, KEV prioritisation, and remediation SLA workflow.
Audit overseas LLM routing, no-log/no-train agreements, safetensors loading, uploads, output evaluations, and hallucination acknowledgement.
Determine whether the Low-Risk Cloud, Medium-Risk Cloud, High-Risk CII, Sandbox, or Gen-AI SSP applies.
